name: Promotion Performance Alert
description: Monitors active promotion performance: flags underperforming promotions (<5% redemption after 3 days) and overperforming/budget-risk promotions (>50% budget consumed in first 25% of duration)

dataSource.query: SELECT p.promotion_id, p.promotion_name, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.total_budget, p.budget_consumed, p.redemption_count, p.eligible_customers, ROUND(p.redemption_count * 100.0 / NULLIF(p.eligible_customers, 0), 2) AS redemption_rate_pct, ROUND(p.budget_consumed * 100.0 / NULLIF(p.total_budget, 0), 2) AS budget_consumed_pct, DATEDIFF(day, p.start_date, CURRENT_DATE()) AS days_active, DATEDIFF(day, p.start_date, p.end_date) AS total_duration_days, ROUND(DATEDIFF(day, p.start_date, CURRENT_DATE()) * 100.0 / NULLIF(DATEDIFF(day, p.start_date, p.end_date), 0), 2) AS duration_elapsed_pct FROM active_promotions_performance p WHERE p.end_date > CURRENT_DATE() AND (   (DATEDIFF(day, p.start_date, CURRENT_DATE()) >= 3 AND (p.redemption_count * 100.0 / NULLIF(p.eligible_customers, 0)) < 5.0)   OR   ((p.budget_consumed * 100.0 / NULLIF(p.total_budget, 0)) > 50.0 AND (DATEDIFF(day, p.start_date, CURRENT_DATE()) * 100.0 / NULLIF(DATEDIFF(day, p.start_date, p.end_date), 0)) < 25.0) )

actions.subject: 📊 Promotion Alert: {{promotion_name}} ({{promotion_id}}) — {{#if (lt redemption_rate_pct 5)}}Underperforming{{else}}Budget Risk{{/if}}
actions.body:
A running promotion requires attention.

Promotion: {{promotion_name}} (ID: {{promotion_id}})
Duration: {{start_date}} to {{end_date}} ({{days_active}}/{{total_duration_days}} days elapsed)

Performance Metrics:
  • Redemption Rate: {{redemption_rate_pct}}% ({{redemption_count}}/{{eligible_customers}} customers)
  • Budget Consumed: {{budget_consumed_pct}}% (${{budget_consumed}}/${{total_budget}})
  • Duration Elapsed: {{duration_elapsed_pct}}%

{{#if (lt redemption_rate_pct 5)}}⚠️ UNDERPERFORMING: Redemption rate is below 5% after {{days_active}} days.
Recommendation: Consider increasing visibility (featured placement), adjusting discount amount, or extending the promotion with revised targeting.{{/if}}{{#if (and (gt budget_consumed_pct 50) (lt duration_elapsed_pct 25))}}🚨 BUDGET RISK: Over 50% of budget consumed in first 25% of promotion duration.
Recommendation: Consider pausing the promotion, reducing per-redemption value, or requesting additional budget if ROI is positive.{{/if}}

actions.message: 📊 Promo Alert | {{promotion_name}} | {{#if (lt redemption_rate_pct 5)}}Underperforming: {{redemption_rate_pct}}% redemption after {{days_active}} days{{else}}Budget Risk: {{budget_consumed_pct}}% budget used at {{duration_elapsed_pct}}% duration{{/if}}
